title: Dharmapuri mango GI tag drives record export bookings for May
summary: The Dharmapuri mango cluster's Geographical Indication tag has driven record export bookings for May 2026, with confirmed orders from UAE, Singapore and Malaysia exceeding last year's full-season volume.

title: Dharmapuri counting halls finalised; six Assembly seats covered
summary: Counting halls for Dharmapuri district's six Assembly constituencies — Pennagaram, Dharmapuri, Pappireddipatti, Harur, Palacode and Mettur reaches — have been finalised with full security and tabulation arrangements.

title: Hogenakkal falls reopens to tourists with revised coracle limits
summary: Hogenakkal falls has reopened to tourists with revised coracle ride limits and life-jacket mandate after last week's brief closure due to flash flow concerns. Daily visitor capacity has been capped at 6,000.

title: Dharmapuri sericulture sector mulls cocoon-procurement modernisation
summary: The Dharmapuri Sericulture Cooperative is reviewing a proposal for digital weighing, AI-driven grading and direct-payment systems at all 12 cocoon procurement centres across the district.

title: Dharmapuri receives heavy rain warning; Pennagaram on yellow alert
summary: IMD has placed Dharmapuri district under a heavy rainfall warning today, with Pennagaram, Pappireddipatti and Harur taluks on yellow alert. Hogenakkal falls visitor numbers may be regulated again if levels rise.

title: Granite cluster operators meet on environmental compliance roadmap
summary: Operators of Dharmapuri's granite quarrying cluster met district authorities to finalise a phased environmental compliance roadmap covering dust control, blast-zone buffers and worker health monitoring.

title: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering wins TN smart-city hackathon
summary: A team from Adhiyamaan College of Engineering in Hosur — admitted from across Krishnagiri-Dharmapuri belt — has won the state smart-city hackathon with an AI-driven traffic signal optimisation prototype.

title: Dharmapuri govt hospital opens 24x7 dialysis centre
summary: Dharmapuri Government Medical College Hospital has opened a fully-equipped 24x7 dialysis centre with 18 stations, reducing patient travel to Salem and Bengaluru for routine sessions.

title: Palacode block records highest mango yield estimate in five years
summary: Pre-harvest estimates from horticulture officials show the Palacode block in Dharmapuri is on track for its highest mango yield in five years, with weather conditions favourable through bloom and fruit-set.

title: New Salem-Bengaluru bypass survey routes through Dharmapuri
summary: NHAI's preliminary survey for a new Salem-Bengaluru high-speed bypass has identified an alignment passing through Dharmapuri, potentially cutting current travel times by an estimated 90 minutes.

title: Adivasi welfare hostels in Harur get smart classroom upgrade
summary: Twelve Adivasi welfare residential schools across the Harur block have been equipped with smart classrooms featuring digital boards, tablets and bilingual STEM content under a CSR-funded programme.

title: Dharmapuri civic body cracks down on illegal sand transport
summary: Dharmapuri district authorities seized 24 lorries and registered 36 cases over the past week in a sustained crackdown on illegal sand transport along Cauvery and Thoppaiyar river beds.
